Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elder Whisper]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Elder Whisper's tower is a prominent landmark in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Elder Whisper joined the clan founders to create the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Elder Whisper created the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Elder Whisper is more honored than the current Wei Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Elder Whisper is a sacred fox with white fur and five bushy tails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Elder Whisper has one jet-black eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Elder Whisper is an ancient sacred beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Elder Whisper is a five-tailed snowfox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Elder Whisper is the original master of the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Elder Whisper harvests light and dreams into his core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Elder Whisper has spent a hundred years meditating on the nature of dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Elder Whisper has a sense for fate.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has encountered Elder Whisper.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Elder Whisper has a tower back home.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Elder Whisper was not present at the gathering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — A black tail slashed through the middle of Elder Whisper’s tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Elder Whisper can use a cloak of invisibility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Elder Whisper can visit Heaven’s Glory unseen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Elder Whisper spoke of a tool brought to their lands by the Sage.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Elder Whisper is a white fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Elder Whisper is an elder of Lindon's clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Elder Whisper has held the Sword Sage’s private void space open for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Elder Whisper is a person who can observe the labyrinth door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Elder Whisper is a fox that cannot be trusted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Elder Whisper believes there may be someone else in the labyrinth.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
